title: Attuma
content:
{{Character |image = Attuma - Infobox.png |real name = Attuma{{Ref|BPWF}} |alias = {{Alias |nicknames = Ajba'ate’el{{Ref|BPWF}}Translates from Yucatec Maya to: "''Warrior''"}} |species = [[Talokanil]] |citizenship = [[Talokan|Talokanil]] |gender = Male |affiliation = [[Talokanil Armed Forces]] |movie = ''[[Black Panther: Wakanda Forever]]''
''[[Avengers: Doomsday]]'' (unreleased)[https://x.com/UpdatesCAP4/status/1927017217612206244 Captain America News on X - May 25, 2025] |actor = [[Alex Livinalli]] |status = Alive}} {{Quote|Líik'ik [[Talokan]]!Translates from Yucatec Maya to: "''Rise Talokan!''"|Attuma|Black Panther: Wakanda Forever}}'''Attuma''' is a fierce [[Talokanil]] warrior and one of [[Namor]]'s advisors. ==Biography== ===[[Talokanil-Wakandan War]]=== ====[[Attack on the Harvey Sub-Sea]]==== {{Quote|Xene'ex!Translates from Yucatec Maya to: "''Go!''"|Attuma to the [[Talokanil]] Warriors|Black Panther: Wakanda Forever}}[[File:Attuma attacks.png|{{AltFloat}}|Attuma springs from the water]] Attuma was one of the leaders of the Talokanil Army and was among the best warriors. When they found a [[Vibranium Detector]] in the ocean, Attuma and his army went to stop the [[humans]]. They swiftly killed [[Jackson (Navy SEAL)|Jackson]] and [[Rita Salazar]] before using hypnotic chants to force the Humans overboard. Attuma then dragged [[Henderson (Navy SEAL)|Henderson]] off the ship before jumping out of the water with [[Namora]]. [[File:Attuma and warriors.png|{{AltFloat}}|Attuma with Talokanil warriors on the ''[[Harvey Sub-Sea]]'']] Attuma powerfully sent a spear through the heart of [[Smitty (Navy SEAL)|Smitty]]. Walking over to his victim, he coldly ripped the spear out of the wall. He then faced [[Graham (Doctor)|Graham]] who started shooting at him, stunned to see it did not pierce his skin. Attuma then told his army to chase after her.{{Ref|BPWF}} ====[[Chase of Riri Williams|Abducting Riri Williams]]==== {{Quote|Bin ti nukuch [[Namora]].Translates from Yucatec Maya to: "''Go to Namora.''"|Attuma to the [[Talokanil]] Warriors|Black Panther: Wakanda Forever}} [[File:Talokanil.png|{{AltFloat}}|Attuma with Namora in [[Cambridge]]]] [[Namor]] sent the [[Talokanil]] to [[Cambridge]] to capture [[Riri Williams]], as well as Princess [[Shuri]]. Attuma and [[Namora]] arrived on the bridge, throwing a [[Hydrobomb]] at the group. Attuma then faced [[Okoye]] and saw her plow through his men. He called her warrior, as a sign of respect. He was told by Namora to kill Williams while she would take care of the cops. [[File:Okoye and Attuma duel.png|{{AltFloat}}|Attuma fiercely fights [[Okoye]]]] As she did that, Attuma fought Okoye, exchanging blows. Attuma was impressed with Okoye's skill, but still took her down by slamming her into her own [[Vibranium Spear|spear]]. He then took her spear and passed it back to her, taunting Okoye. She took the spear and fought again but was outmatched. He then picked up her spear once again and told her she was not worth his own axe. He went to kill her, but she shocked him with her tech. Namora then returned, telling Attuma to stop playing games. Attuma then deflected a water bomb at Okoye, sending her over the bridge. He then took off his [[Talokanil Rebreather]] and gave it to Shuri, telling her to breathe before taking her to [[Talokan]].{{Ref|BPWF}} ====[[Attack on Birnin Zana]]==== {{Quote|Ixba'ate’el!Translates from Yucatec Maya to: "''Warrior!''"|Attuma to [[Okoye]]|Black Panther: Wakanda Forever}}[[File:9158041.jpg|left|{{AltFloat}}|Attuma and the [[Talokanil]] preparing for the [[Attack on Birnin Zana|attack]]]] When [[Shuri]] was broken out, [[Namor]] talked to the nation of [[Talokan]] and told them it was his fault for exposing them to [[Wakanda]]. He vowed to take Wakanda down. The army arrived in Wakanda and sent a tidal wave into the main city. As all commotion broke loose, Attuma got to high ground and scouted out [[Okoye]]. He called for her, saying "warrior" once again. She merely looked at him before saving children. The invasion ended with Queen [[Ramonda]]'s death.{{Ref|BPWF}} ====[[Ambush on the Talokanil|Battle at ''Sea Leopard'']]==== {{Quote|Ajba'ate'el!"Translates from Yucatec Maya to: "''Warrior!''"
"T'aan áak waale’ i'chi 'na t'aak? Xuluk ch'i'ibalobe yetelo'...Translates from Yucatec Maya to: "''You speak the mother tongue? You can greet your ancestors with it...''"|[[Okoye]] and Attuma|Black Panther: Wakanda Forever}} Later, Attuma and [[Namora]] informed [[Namor]] that there was another [[Vibranium Detector]] in the ocean. They located the Vibranium Detector in the Atlantic Ocean, and Namor led his [[Talokanil Armed Forces|army]] to it. They approached it, but it emitted a loud frequency. The army arose from the ocean only to see the ''[[Sea Leopard]]'' in front of them. [[Black Panther]] led the charge against the Talokanil. Namora was eventually able to tip the boat, sending [[Wakanda]]ns into the water so they can gain an advantage. [[File:Attuma on Royal Sea Leopard.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Attuma is challenged by [[Okoye]]]] Attuma then made it to the top of the boat and was met by [[Okoye]] in her [[Midnight Angel Armor]]. She started speaking Yucatec Maya, calling him "warrior". He was impressed that she now spoke the mother tongue, but fought her, nonetheless, briefly gaining an upper hand. They fought some more as Attuma told her it was time to greet her ancestors. Later in the fight, Okoye repeated the same thing back to him before blasting him off the edge of the ship. Finally, the fighting stopped when [[Namor]] and Black Panther returned, calling an alliance.{{Ref|BPWF}} ==Powers and Abilities== ===Powers=== {{Quote|They were blue. And they had superhuman strength. And they came from the water on the backs of whales. I struck down three of them with blows that should've killed them, but they rose again.|[[Okoye]]|Black Panther: Wakanda Forever}} *'''Talokanil Physiology''': Like all [[Talokanil]], Attuma is an aquatic being with superhuman abilities such as enhanced strength, durability, speed, agility, stamina, reflexes, and accelerated healing. He is also capable of emitting a hypnotic sonic attack with his voice. **'''Superhuman Strength''': Attuma possesses enhanced strength. His blows are strong enough that even [[Okoye]] with her powerful [[Vibranium Spear]] was unable to contain it without being stunned and exhausted. **'''Superhuman Durability''': Attuma is more durable than humans. He was unfazed when [[Graham (Doctor)|Graham]] fired her gun at close-to-medium range. **'''Superhuman Speed''': Thanks to living underwater, Attuma is very fast at swimming and is also fast on land. **'''Superhuman Agility''': In the water, Attuma has enhanced agility that allows him to dodge his enemies. **'''Superhuman Stamina''': During battle, Attuma finds himself being able to last for a long duration without slowing down. **'''Superhuman Reflexes''': Attuma is able to dodge several of Okoye's strikes with her spear without much effort. **'''Enhanced Vision''': As a being that lives underwater, Attuma has very good vision, capable of seeing in water more than a regular human eye. **'''Regenerative Healing Factor''': Despite his body's resistance, Attuma could still be injured like any other Talokanil. However, his metabolism enabled him to rapidly regenerate damaged bodily tissue with great speed, which is more effective when he is in contact with water. **'''Aquatic Adaptation''': Attuma is capable of breathing underwater by absorbing the oxygen of the water through the gills in his neck, and his body is specially developed for underwater conditions, granting him specialized blood circulation to withstand freezing temperatures. He possesses a highly developed vision to see clearly even in the near-total darkness of the ocean floor and can also hear underwater as well as humans do on land. **'''Aquatic Telepathy''': Like any other [[Talokanil]], Attuma can mentally communicate with marine life and persuade them to do his bidding. **'''Hypnosis''': Attuma, as well as other [[Talokanil]] can create a sound that hypnotize his victims, leading them to jump into the water, where they will drown. However, this can be stopped by a loud sound. **'''Wallcrawling''': Attuma is able to crawl on any type of walls. ===Abilities=== {{Quote|Chi'kunalook estali'niti ta'witi.Translates from Yucatec Maya to: "''You're not worth my blade.''"|Attuma to [[Okoye]]|Black Panther: Wakanda Forever}} *'''Master Combatant''': As a Talokanil warrior, Attuma received extensive combat training which allowed for excellent skill in many fields of combat. He is quite confident in his skills, calling [[Okoye]] for a fight every time that they see each other, and even returned the latter's spear during their first confrontation. Attuma accurately knocked a water bomb in her direction with his hip similar to a game played by Talokanil children.[https://screenrant.com/black-panther-2-attuma-namora-fighting-style/ Black Panther 2 VFX Editor Reveals Talokan Fighting Style Easter Egg] Attuma defeats Okoye during their first interaction. *[[File:Attuma.png|thumb|250px|Attuma using his axe in combat against [[Okoye]]]]'''Axe Mastery''': As a Talokanil warrior, Attuma is extremely skilled at using his axe in close quarters combat and as a long-ranged weapon. He was able to defeat many Wakandan warriors and [[CIA]] agents. He is also accurate in throwing it, being able to precisely throw his spear to pierce [[Smitty (Navy SEAL)|Smitty]]. {{Quote|The [[Talokanil|people]] who took [[Shuri|her]] spoke Yucatec Mayan.|[[Griot]] to [[Ramonda]]|Black Panther: Wakanda Forever}} *'''Multilingualism''': Attuma is fluent in his native Yucatec Maya, as well as English. ==Equipment== ===Weapons=== *'''Axe''': Attuma uses a specialized axe capable of collapsing into a handle for concealment. *'''[[Talokanil Spear]]''': Attuma used a spear during the [[Attack on the Harvey Sub-Sea]], when he threw it on [[Smitty (Navy SEAL)|Smitty]], killing him. *'''[[Vibranium Spear]]''': Attuma did not want to kill [[Okoye]] with his axe, deeming her unworthy, so he attempted to use her own weapon against her. However, he was prevented from doing so because the latter used her [[Kimoyo Beads]] to shock the handle. ===Other Equipment=== *'''[[Talokanil Rebreather]]''': When going out of water onto land, Attuma uses the respirator to survive, as it enables him to breathe on the land, being filled with water. Attuma gave his respirator to [[Shuri]], removing the water, to allow her to return to [[Talokan]] with him. ==Facilities== *'''[[Talokan Capital City]]''': Attuma lives in the underwater city as a high-ranking warrior. ==Relationships== {{Col-begin}}{{Col-2}} ===Allies=== *[[Talokanil]] **[[Namor]] - King **[[Namora]] *[[Ironheart|Riri Williams/Ironheart]] - Former Target *[[Golden Tribe]] **[[Black Panther|Shuri/Black Panther]] - Former Captive *[[Midnight Angels]] **[[Okoye]] - Former Attempted Victim and Rival **[[Aneka]] *[[River Tribe]] - Former Enemies **[[Nakia]] *[[Dora Milaje]] - Former Enemies **[[Ayo]] **[[Nomble]] **[[Yama]] *[[Jabari Tribe]] - Former Enemies **[[M'Baku]] *[[Wakandan Royal Guard]] - Former Enemies {{Col-2}} ===Enemies=== *[[United States Navy SEALs]] **[[Smitty (Navy SEAL)|Smitty]] † - Victim **[[Rita Salazar]] † **[[Jackson (Navy SEAL)|Jackson]] † **[[Henderson (Navy SEAL)|Henderson]] † - Victim *[[CIA]] **[[Graham (Doctor)|Graham]] † *[[Cambridge Police Department]] {{Col-end}} ==Trivia== *In the comics, '''Attuma''' is an [[w:c:marvel:Atlanteans (Homo mermanus)|Atlantean]] of the exiled [[w:c:marvel:Skarka Tribe (Earth-616)|Skarka Tribe]] who believes himself to be the prophesied warrior who would conquer [[Atlantis]] by force. He is an archenemy of [[Namor]]. He allied with [[Kang the Conqueror]] when he arrived to conquer his universe and helped attack [[Canada]]. ==Behind the Scenes== ''To be added'' ==References== {{Gallery|Attuma/Gallery}} {{Wq|Attuma}} {{Reflist}} ==External Links== *{{Marvel|Attuma}} *{{WP|Attuma}} *{{Marvel.com|characters/attuma}} [[Category:Characters]] [[Category:Black Panther: Wakanda Forever Characters]] [[Category:Avengers: Doomsday Characters]] [[Category:Talokanil]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Black Hair]] [[Category:Brown Eyes]] [[Category:Multilingual Characters]] [[Category:High Body Count]] [[es:Attuma]]
